keys.description: Array of JWK objects (RFC 7517). Includes the ML-DSA-65 PQC key when pqc_enabled.

config.description: Provider-specific fields. Password-type fields are blanked in responses; leave them empty on update to keep the stored secret.

password.description: Write-only; never returned. Leave empty on update to keep the stored value.

info.description: Clavex is a multi-tenant OIDC/OAuth2 identity platform. All admin endpoints require a Bearer JWT obtained from POST /api/v1/auth/login. Tenant OIDC endpoints follow RFC 8414 discovery and are prefixed with /{org_slug}.
info.title: Clavex Identity Platform API

get.summary: Get agent token audience policy org admin

put.summary: Set agent token audience policy org admin

200.description: The authenticated user's own agent tokens

404.description: Not found or not owned by the caller

post.summary: Admin login — obtain a short-lived JWT

get.summary: Resolve effective branding cascade (client → org → default)

post.summary: Begin passkey registration (residentKey=required, syncs to iCloud Keychain / Google Password Manager)
Confirm TOTP enrollment with a valid code
Begin TOTP enrollment (returns QR code / secret)

schema.description: Same proof bundle as auditLatestProof. Slug-based endpoint for auditors who don't have the org UUID.

200.description: Latest Merkle proof bundle (slug-based, public, no auth required)

404.description: Organization not found or no checkpoints sealed

get.summary: Get latest audit Merkle proof bundle by org slug (public, no auth)

get.description: Returns the chain of RS256-signed SHA-256 Merkle checkpoints over audit log rows. Each checkpoint covers a batch of 100 rows. Use VerifyChain offline for NIS2 / enterprise audit compliance.

schema.description: Self-contained audit Merkle proof bundle — save to disk and verify offline with: clavexctl audit verify --proof proof.json

200.description: Latest Merkle proof bundle (public, no auth required)

get.summary: Get latest audit Merkle proof bundle (public, no auth)

post.summary: Seal unsealed audit rows into a new Merkle checkpoint

delete.summary: Delete per-client branding override (reverts to org branding)

get.summary: DSAR (Data Subject Access Request) export for user

200.description: Erasure confirmation with affected row counts

delete.summary: GDPR Art.17 right to erasure — anonymise and purge user personal data

get.summary: NIS2 evidence report (includes Merkle chain status)
Get login history for a user

delete.summary: Delete MFA credential (admin — for account recovery)

get.description: Computes a real-time risk score from: recent login failures, impossible travel, new country/ASN, datacenter/VPN ASN, unusual hour, new device fingerprint.
get.summary: Get identity risk score for a user (0-100 composite)

delete.summary: Revoke all trusted devices for a user

get.summary: List trusted devices for a user

get.description: Renders the HTML page shown when a user has ENROLL_PASSKEY in required_actions. Requires a valid login_session_id query parameter.

400.description: Session expired or WebAuthn not configured

post.summary: Begin WebAuthn registration for login-time passkey enrollment
Finish WebAuthn registration, clear ENROLL_PASSKEY action, redirect to authorize/resume

delete.summary: Reset adaptive lockout config to global defaults

get.description: Returns the per-org lockout band configuration. If no custom config exists, the response contains the global defaults.

put.description: Creates or replaces the lockout band configuration. Bands map risk-score ranges to failure thresholds and lockout durations. Omit bands to reset to defaults.

post.description: Generate a new ML-DSA-65 PQC signing key and retire the current one. Returns 404 when pqc_enabled is false.
Generate a new classical RSA signing key and retire the current one. The retired key stays in the JWKS for a grace period.

get.summary: Get security posture for the organization

get.description: Returns the org SMS gateway config with secret fields redacted. Empty object if not configured.

put.description: Create or update the SMS provider config. Blank password fields keep the stored secret; the config is validated by instantiating the provider before saving.

post.description: Send a test SMS to the given number using the stored configuration.

400.description: SMS not configured or invalid configuration

get.description: Returns the org SMTP config (password never returned). Empty object if not configured.

post.summary: Retry a failed SCIM push delivery

post.description: Returns CredentialRequestOptions with allowCredentials=[] and mediation=conditional. The browser shows its built-in passkey picker / autofill. Public endpoint — no auth needed.
post.summary: Begin passkey login (conditional UI / browser autofill — no session required)

parameters.description: The challenge value from the begin response (echoed back by client)
parameters.name: X-Passkey-Challenge

200.description: Resolved user ID — caller creates a session

post.summary: Finish passkey login — user identity resolved from credential ID

post.description: Supports: authorization_code, refresh_token, client_credentials, urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code, urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:jwt-bearer. DPoP binding (RFC 9449) supported via DPoP header.
